name: bameetech-lead-management
description: BameeTech - Professional Lead Management & Subscription Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.test: concurrently "cd server && npm test" "cd client && npm test"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd server && npm run lint" "cd client && npm run lint"
scripts.prepare-deploy: npm run build && npm run test

author: BameeTech
